headline: How cookies and similar technologies are used
subheadline: Camp Dream GA uses cookies and similar technologies to support site functionality, understand usage, and prepare the site for compliant advertising and analytics.

sections.title: Essential technologies
sections.description: Some technologies support core site functions such as routing, session continuity, and normal page behavior.

sections.title: Analytics technologies
sections.description: Analytics-related technologies may help us understand which pages visitors use, how traffic arrives, and which content performs well.

sections.title: Advertising technologies
sections.description: If advertising is enabled on eligible content pages, partners may use cookies or similar tools to measure ad performance and improve relevance where applicable.
